article.title: Cool & Dre
article.content: Cool & Dre, Marcello "Cool" Valenzano ve Andre "Dre" Christopher Lyon'un bir araya gelerek oluşturdukları Miami, Florida kökenli hip hop müzik yapım ekibi. Grubun kendilerine ait Epidemic Records adında bir plak şirketleri bulunmaktadır. == Diskografi == === 2001 === ==== Fat Joe - Jealous Ones Still Envy (J.O.S.E.) ==== 03. "King of N.Y." === 2002 === ==== Fat Joe - Loyalty ==== 03. "Prove Something" 04. "TS Piece" 07. "Born in the Ghetto" 10. "All I Need" 11. "Life Goes On" 12. "Loyalty" ==== Ja Rule - Last Temptation ==== 13. "Destiny (Outro)" === 2003 === ==== Killer Mike - Monster ==== 06. "All 4 U" 10. "Home Of The Brave" === 2004 === ==== 8Ball & MJG - Living Legends ==== 18. "Confessions" ==== Ja Rule - R.U.L.E. ==== 05. "New York" (feat. Fat Joe & Jadakiss) ==== Terror Squad - True Story ==== 03. "Hum Drum" 05. "Take Me Home" (feat. Dre) 10. "Let Them Things Go" (feat. Dre & Young Selah) === 2005 === ==== Chamillionaire - The Sound of Revenge ==== 05. "No Snitchin'" (feat. Bun B) ==== Chris Brown - Chris Brown ==== 09. "What's My Name" ==== Fat Joe - All or Nothing ==== 04. "So Much More" 05. "My Fofo" 06. "Rock Ya Body" 12. "I Can Do U" 13. "So Hot" (feat. R. Kelly) ==== The Game - The Documentary ==== 04. "Hate It or Love It" (feat. 50 Cent) ==== Lil Wayne - Tha Carter II ==== 21. "Get Over" (Feat. Nikki) ==== Slim Thug - Already Platinum ==== 13. "Miss Mary" ==== Teairra Mari - Roc-A-Fella Presents: Teairra Mari ==== 08. "Get Down Tonight" ==== Trina - Glamorest Life ==== 01. "Sum Mo" (feat. Dre) 13. "Lil' Mama" (feat. Dre) === 2006 === ==== Christina Milian - So Amazin' ==== 01. "Say I" (feat. Young Jeezy) 02. "Twisted" 03. "Gonna Tell Everybody" 04. "Who's Gonna Ride" (feat. Three 6 Mafia) 05. "So Amazing" (feat. Dre) 06. "Hot Boy" (feat. Dre) 07. "Foolin'" 08. "My Lovin' Goes" 09. "Just a Little Bit" 12. "Tonight (International Bonus)" 13. "She Don't Know " ==== DJ Khaled - Listennn... The Album ==== 06. "Holla at Me" (feat. Lil Wayne, Paul Wall, Fat Joe, Rick Ross & Pitbull) 08. "Destroy You" (feat. Krayzie Bone & Twista) 10. "Candy Paint" (feat. Slim Thug, Trina & Chamillionaire) 15. "Movement" (feat. Dre) ==== Ghostface Killah - Fishscale ==== 24. "Three Bricks" (feat. Raekwon & Notorious B.I.G.) ==== Juvenile - The Reality Check ==== 05. "Rodeo" 09. "Break a Brick Down" ==== Kelis - Kelis Was Here ==== 07. "Goodbyes" ==== Nashawn - Napalm ==== 15. "Money Machine" (feat. Nas, Ying Yang Twins & Jungle) ==== Remy Ma - There's Something about Remy: Based on a True Story ==== 04. "Tight" (feat. Fat Joe) 18. "Still" ==== Rhymefest - Blue Collar ==== 08. "More" (feat. Kanye West) 10. "All Girls Cheat" (feat. Mario) ==== Rick Ross - Port of Miami ==== 03. "Blow" (feat. Dre) 07. "Boss" (feat. Dre) ==== Young Jeezy - The Inspiration: Thug Motivation 102 ==== 09. "Streets on Lock" === 2007 === ==== Beanie Sigel - The Solution ==== 02. "Bout That (Let Me Know)" ==== Chingy - Hate It or Love It ==== 13. "Roll on 'Em" (feat. Rick Ross) ==== DJ Khaled - We the Best ==== 04. "Brown Paper Bag" (feat. Dre, Young Jeezy, Juelz Santana, Rick Ross, Lil Wayne & Fat Joe) 07. "I'm From the Ghetto" (feat. Dre, The Game, Jadakiss & Trick Daddy) 11. "The Originators" (feat. Bone Thugs-N-Harmony) 12. "New York" (feat. Jadakiss, Fat Joe & Ja Rule) 15. "Choppers" (feat. Dre, Joe Hound & C-Ride) ==== Freeway - Free at Last ==== 13. "Lights Get Low" (feat. Rick Ross & Dre) ==== Joe - Ain't Nothin' Like Me ==== 09. "Let's Just Do It" (feat. Fabolous) 11. "Just Relax" (feat. Dre) ==== Tru-Life - Tru York ==== 03. "If You Want To" 14. "Scarface" ==== Yung Joc - Hustlenomics ==== 02. "Play Your Cards" === 2008 === ==== Ace Hood - Gutta ==== 14. "Ghetto" (feat. Dre) ==== B.G. - Too Hood to Be Hollywood ==== 00. "Ya Heard Me" (feat. Juvenile, Lil Wayne & Trey Songz) ==== David Banner - The Greatest Story Ever Told ==== 08. "A Girl" 16. "Fuck You Hoes" (feat. Jim Jones) ==== DJ Khaled - We Global ==== 05. "I'm On" (feat. Nas & Cool) ==== DJ Pharris - Hood Radio ==== 00. "Stop" (feat. DJ Khaled, The Game, Sly Polaroid, Rick Ross) ==== Fat Joe - The Elephant in the Room ==== 02. "Ain't Sayin' Nothin'" (feat. Plies & Dre) ==== The Game - LAX ==== 05. "My Life" (feat. Lil Wayne) 06. "Money" 01. "Big Dreams" (Deluxe Edition Bonus CD) 02. "Camera Phone" (feat. Ne-Yo) (Deluxe Edition Bonus CD) 00. "Red Magic" (feat. Lil Wayne) (Unused Track) ==== Gym Class Heroes - The Quilt ==== 03. "Peace Sign/Index Down" (feat. Busta Rhymes) 09. "Don't Tell Me It's Over" (feat. Dre & Lil Wayne) 10. "Live Forever (Fly with Me)" (feat. Daryl Hall) 12. "Home" (feat. Dre) ==== Nas - Untitled ==== 04. "Make the World Go Round" (feat. Chris Brown & The Game) (Yardımcı yapımcı: The Game) ==== Omar Cruz - Sign of the Cruz ==== 00. "Gangsta Music" (feat. The Game) ==== Scarface - Emeritus ==== 03. "Forget About Me" (feat. Lil Wayne & Bun B) ==== Jay Rock - Follow Me Home ==== 01. "All My Life" (feat. Lil Wayne & Will.i.am) ==== Wale - Attention: Deficit ==== 00. "Chillin" (feat. Lady GaGa) === Tekliler === 2004: "New York" (Ja Rule featuring Fat Joe & Jadakiss) 2005: "Hate It or Love It" (The Game featuring 50 Cent) 2005: "So Much More" (Fat Joe) 2006: "Rodeo" (Juvenile) 2006: "Say I" (Christina Milian featuring Young Jeezy) 2006: "Holla at Me" (DJ Khaled featuring Lil Wayne, Paul Wall, Fat Joe, Rick Ross & Pitbull) 2006: "Chevy Ridin' High" (Dre featuring Rick Ross) 2007: "100 Million" (Birdman featuring Young Jeezy, Rick Ross & Lil Wayne) 2008: "We Made It" (Busta Rhymes featuring Linkin Park) 2008: "Ain't Sayin' Nothin'" (Fat Joe featuring Dre & Plies) 2008: "Ya Heard Me" (B.G. featuring Juvenile, Lil Wayne & Trey Songz) 2008: "Peace Sign/Index Down" (Gym Class Heroes featuring Busta Rhymes) 2008: "Eyes Open" (Yung Ralph featuring Dre) 2008: "My Life" (The Game featuring Lil Wayne) 2008: "Make the World Go Round" (Nas featuring The Game ve Chris Brown) 2008: "All My Life" (Jay Rock featuring Lil Wayne) 2008: "Camera Phone" (The Game featuring Ne-Yo) == Kaynakça == == Dış bağlantılar == Myspace'te Cool & Dre

items.question: The Game'in Lil Wayne ile birlikte yer aldığı 2008 yılındaki şarkısının adı nedir?
Parçalar, Cool & Dre'nin kimliğini ve Fat Joe'nun 'Jealous Ones Still Envy (J.O.S.E.)' albümündeki 3 numaralı parçanın adını nasıl belirtmektedir?
items.answer: Cool & Dre, Miami, Florida kökenli bir hip hop müzik yapım ekibidir ve kendilerine ait Epidemic Records adlı bir plak şirketleri bulunmaktadır. Fat Joe'nun 'Jealous Ones Still Envy (J.O.S.E.)' albümündeki 3 numaralı parça ise 'King of N.Y.' olarak belirtilmiştir.
